generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100System : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, featuring motors and gearboxes for each axis, controlled by a Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller, operating in a machining domain requiring precise motion control for manufacturing processes."
    base:contains MABIMAX100PositionEncoder, MABIMAX100CurrentSensor, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, SiemensSINUMERIK840DController
]

instance MABIMAX100PositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Two position encoders per drive for precise angular measurement, sensor data streamed in real-time via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MABIMAX100CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures input current (I_M) for motor torque control, collected at high sampling frequencies to ensure accurate system state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorInputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis, with input current (I_M) controlling torque (τ_M) output"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller handling actuation commands and integrating with simulation models for motor and gearbox dynamics actuation precise within specified operational ranges with safety constraints enforced by firmware"
]

instance AngularPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MABIMAX100PositionEncoder
]

instance MotorInputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MABIMAX100CurrentSensor
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position measurements from position encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) measurements for motor control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorInputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling including Interface Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for dynamic simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling and data management across abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService, DataManagementService
]

instance BehavioralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using MontiArc Automaton and C++"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorModelingInsight
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for dynamic simulation and real-time analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMotionService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for managing data across abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, technical)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataManagementService
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow reference model (Fig. 1) defines important concepts for digital shadows in manufacturing, where the shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from the physical object to the digital object, requiring active components from a Digital Twin to interpret and process incoming data without autonomous operation or data pushback to the physical system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for communication between physical sensors and digital entities for time series data streaming."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adoption of architecture description languages (ADLs) such as SysML, AADL, ACME, and MontiArc for system modeling, alongside simulation tools like MathWorks Simulink and general-purpose programming languages (C++, Java) for behavior description and implementation."
]
